gameData.weather: 66 degrees at game time. With a breeze blowing in from center field...

result.description: Alex Chase grounds into a double play, second base Nate Diaz to shortstop Caleb Jones to first base Owen Chen. TJ Hawkins out at 2nd. Alex Chase out at 1st.
Sam Decker grounds into a double play, first base Felix Washington to shortstop Wes Griffin to first base Felix Washington. Marcus Thorne out at 2nd. Sam Decker out at 1st.
